message:
feat(net): implement TCP keepalive, fix UDP error handling, add hardening tests (bd-gl8u)

- Implement set_keepalive() using socket2::TcpKeepalive instead of
  returning Unsupported error. Supports enable with idle time and disable.
- Fix UDP poll_send_to: previously swallowed non-WouldBlock errors when
  iterating addresses. Now returns first WouldBlock as Pending or
  propagates the last real error.
- Add 29 hardening integration tests covering keepalive, connect timeout,
  shutdown, TTL, nodelay, registration cleanup, UDP boundaries, broadcast,
  concurrent TCP connects, and concurrent UDP sends.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
